titleStmt.title: SII 37.456: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 456. (A.R. No. B 23 of 1942-43.) Pagiḍyāla, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Vīrabhadrasvāmi temple.
This is dated in Śaka 1477, Rākshasa, Kārttīka śu. 12, corresponding to 1555 A.D., October 27, Sunday.

It registers a gift of one Varāha per year to the god Vīranna of Payiḍāla situated in the Mosalimaḍugu-sīma by Sāḷuva Timmaya and another person (his name is missing in the record) for the merit of the twenty four families of their Dommari community.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁ
bbulu Agunēṭi 1477 rākṣasa saṁvatsara kārti
ka śu 12 lu śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirājaparamēśvara śrī vī
rapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu vidyāna
garamaṁdu vajraśiṁhmāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛthivi sāṁ
mrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu mōsalimaḍugu śīma
lōni payiḍālavīraṁṇnaku kauvutarāyani kānama
nēni pautṛṁḍaina varadayyāgāri putṛṁḍaina kēśire
ḍini dalādūḷi mānuvamalneni pautṛṁḍaina basvu
putṛṁḍaina sāḷuva tiṁmmāyānu mādoṁmari yiru
vainālgukuḷālavārki puṇyaṁgānu dhāravōśi sama
rpiṁstimi . yī dhaṁrmmaśāsanānaku ye doṁ
mmari gaḍacēśi Aḍinani vacinānu doṁmma
rivāni vaṁṭivāḍukāḍu yēdokaṁṭiki
vakavarahāni kaṭṭaḍaśēsi samarpiṁstimi . gāna yi
dharmaṁnaku yē doṁmmari tappinānu ta
ma tallitaṁḍṟla vāraṇāśilōnu vadha
yiṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru ma
ṁgalamā śrījēnu .
Digital edition of SII 37.456 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
